entry.title: Re: How to use MAN_CALL to send other document than MSDS
entry.content:
Hello based on: I realized the solution recommended by note 1055907 was implemented a few years ago. This was applied to be able to send a different email object and core depending if it is MAN_CALL, SD_CALL or SUB_CALL. The two programs indicated in the note were modified consequently and the solution of cover sheet was deactivated.

I am not sure if i understand your status correct and therefore it is not really possible to help you.

First: which "two programms" are you refering to ? (The two programs indicated in the note XY). What change did you done? Did you used a "copy" or did you used a "modification"?

Second: explain better the term "email object"; not clear what you refer to..

Third: the two "environmental parameters  (refer to your screenshot) are dedicated to be used in "MSDS/SDS" dispatch only.

If you need something different: you should define e.g. "Z" enviromental parameters and check the use of the original environmental parameter. (whcih "routine" is selecting the content of the parameters)

C.B.

PS: https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/email-body-text-change-in-sost-for-automatic-report-shipping/qaq-p/12802775

could be of interest

entry.title: how to send message to all portal active users?
entry.content: How to send popup message to all active portal users? TH_POPUP is triggering only in GUI and not in portal. please help.

entry.title: Re: Data on the report of the in-progress Calibration ses...
entry.content:
Hello @Marisa_shi,

Yes, we got a response from SF on my question. They identified the reason, and it is due to Auto Data Purge feature. In this Auto Data Purge, there is an option "Audit Data Without Personally Identifiable Information (retention period: 180 days)" which is checked automatically in the lower instances (preview and test). 

Because of this option, the data is getting purged and so the ratings of the calibration sessions fall off from the report.

Regards,
Balaji

entry.title: /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_P and /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_Q Graph
entry.content:
Hi Team,

What is Capacity Integral and Used Capacity in both the /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_P and /MRSS/D_CAG_CG_Q graphs. Please can you explain me with the examples.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Event Mesh Consumption of Messages Not working
entry.content:
I have changed it to the below but still the message is only successfully emitting but I dont see it is printing msg.data anytime.


const cds = require('@sap/cds');
class CatalogService extends cds.ApplicationService {
    async init() {
        const messaging = await cds.connect.to('messaging')

        messaging.on('test/cap/dev/publisher', msg => {
          console.log(msg.data)
        })
       
        this.on('messagePersistence', async (req) => {
          await messaging.emit({
            event: 'test/cap/dev/publisher',
            data: `Hello`
          })
          console.log('Messaging Emitted Done')
          return 'OK'
        })
        return super.init();
    }
}

module.exports = { CatalogService };

entry.title: Re: Define reservation category for movement type 313
entry.content:
You can copy MVT 313 with t-code OMJJ, let's say new MVT Type 913, then you can edit the value of the field "Reserv. cat."

Also you should do this step: in Allowed transactions define MB21 for newly created MVT Type 913

Let's check: 

1. MB21, MVT Type 913

2. Saved RSRV:

3. MIGO, ref to RSRV 172 (MVT913), 1st step

entry.title: Re: how to update startdate and duedate fields in product...
entry.content:
Hi Y-Yusuf,

Please share the screenshot showing all the date (Start Date, Due Date, Order Date etc.) fields (in header and rows) for the affected Production Order.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: S4 PDF preview behavior want to compare with other companies
entry.content:
I am looking for some validation in the PDF preview option (output / spool) and behavior in SAP. Especially how it works in your current S4 system. We have some issues and can not pin point it's a SAP issue, Adobe issue or something else. It's different from our ECC system hence looking for some validation.

Currently GUI 8.00

GUI Options - Interaction design - Control settings = Internet Explorer.

Working with ADS.

In SP01 - when we branch to display on screen - you can go into the menu and select PDF preview.

- ECC behavior - popup if we want to save to file and display "normally" on the screen - you can press the zoom option to make the document a little better.

- S4 behavior - no popup to save and a big gray block is shown. Display saying 100% zoom. Now when we scroll down we are able to view the document - but completely FULL SCREEN. Now when we press the zoom option - suddenly the document is really scaled on the page (like in ECC). Looks like 2 gray blocks above and below the form is added.

I have reviewed some settings in our Adobe Reader that was suggested from OSS notes. We also tried program FP_TEST_00 from an OSS to check the behavior and that is working perfectly w/o issue even the option to save the document to a file.

Additional behavior: When we switch to option in SAP GUI to Chromium the PDF preview now returns blank screen and using zoom functions it does not magically make it appear. 

I would like to know

- How is your PDF behavior in your S4 system? Does it generate directly the print on screen, do you get a popup for saving the file, or same behavior like our system.

- Any hints that might be helpful to troubleshoot? I have searched for OSS and tried a lot but without success.

Note we are working directly with SAP and looks like they have no idea and categorize the behavior as a feature in S4 and would like to have evidence if that is true (or not ofcourse.....)

Merci!

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of the Lite Viewer for SAP Analytics Cloud Stories
entry.content:
Hi @cgueler and @jonshelley,

With the Lite Viewer, it is limited to use cases when someone launches a Story via URL. For our scenarios such as opening a Story via the Application will still open the story in the Full Viewer.

Yes we had initially limited it to ?shellMode=embed but our goal is to make sure that irrespective of the viewer that someone is consuming (i.e. View, Present, or Embed), we provide the most performant experience.

We do apologize that you're experience some issues with the Lite Viewer. Please submit incidents to SAP so that we can investigate them and fix them as quickly as possible.

Regards,

Tunir

entry.title: SAP BY Design - UK BACS Domestic Payment Format
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have a question about the UK BACS Domestic Payment Format.

This is a standard format available in SAP Business By Design. However, our bank has requested some modifications to the file structure to comply with their bank-specific software. I would like to know if this is possible to make such adjustments and if so, how do we import them in the system?

Thank you. 

Best regards.

 Valerie

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello Community - 

Happy to be here and add my voice to the Business Transformation Champions channel.

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH...
entry.content:
Hi,

Are you migrating to S/4 HANA? If that is the case, then you don't need to migrate those Materials but if you bring any Transactional data for those materials then you need to migrate materials as well. 

When I was working on such type of project it took us 6 months, but it was not just for PTP but all other areas as well i.e. SD,MM,FICO etc.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June. Post the DC change in August, we again checked
entry.content:
We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June. Post the DC change in August, we again checked it and it shows -> In use and Valid To: 27 July, 2025.
Is there a need to change the SSL certificate again because of the DC change? ? Could this be impacting the use of existing certificate(installed initially)?
Kindly assist.

entry.title: Re: Behind the Scenes with SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer Feedback
entry.content: The business driven configuration questionnaire can be found in the Perform Initial Business Process Assessment for SAP S/4HANA Cloud task.

entry.title: Re: This document cannot be deleted Message no. V1006
entry.content:
If a Delivery Document (and Invoice, even cancelled) for a Sales Order is existing then the Sales Order cannot be deleted. 

What is the need to delete the Sales Order? Can you not block it or reject it? 

Thanks,

entry.title: Send mail using cl_bcs via SAP distribution list
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to send a mail by using class cl_bcs and a SAP internal distribution list.

That means, I want to create a SAP internal distribution list via SBWP, eg:

Then I want to maintain the mail addresses of recipients in this distribution list.

Then I want to send a mail to this distribution list.

Please do NOT provide any solutions by using deprecated FM SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1!

How could this work? Any got an idea? How can I specifcy / create a recipient object that refers to the distribution list?

BR

entry.title: Re: How do I synchronize flavors/scripts in an a QA envir...
entry.content: Yes. It's also in the Health Check, under Cleanup -> Advanced Options -> Clear Flavor Cache.

entry.title: Re: How is the currency for Statistical value for foreign...
entry.content:
The SAP help of EIKP- GRWCU mentions this is Local Currency of Company that is processing Import/Export Document. 

Can you check on this? 

SAP Help document of EIKP- GRWCU: 

Currency of statistical values for foreign trade

The currency that applies to the statistical value.

Use

As a rule, the currency is the same as the local currency of the company that is processing the export/import document.

Sanan

entry.title: We are considering the option of implementing a promotion action within the same position.
entry.content:
We are considering the option of implementing a promotion action within the same position.

Could you please let us know if this is feasible? If so, we would appreciate guidance on how to apply it and any best practices to follow.

entry.title: Re: Changes in Workflow is not reflecting in quality system
entry.content: Compare the workflow versions between the development and quality environments..In development, new changes might have been updated in the current version itself, whereas in quality, they might have been created as a new version..

entry.title: Custom CSS for component based UI Integration Cards
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm using UI integration card for my advanced workzone on BTP.

The UI integration card is component based.

It works but I can't add custom css.

In a freestyle UI5 app I'm adding css file, reference it in the manifest and it works.

I did it for the card project but on runtime I'm getting 404 for the style file.

Is it possible to add custom css for a component based UI integration card?

If yes, how?

Regards,

Omri

entry.title: YTD Calculation in SAC Excel Add in Using GETDATA()
entry.content:

Currently Excel add is not supporting multiple selection is , is there any workaround?


SAP.GetData("DS_1","YEAR","2024", "Mnth","01,02,03,04,05,06.07")

We are using this for a connection to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC),

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content: @PeiL within the Optimized Experience we have support the option to Link Models which ensures that the entire dashboard is filtered to the same context irrespective of where the filter is from. There is a difference where in the Optimized Experience we have removed the entry point from the Builder Panel as there was a ton of confusion between a Blended Visualization versus a Filtering Across Models. You can still create the link via the toolbar.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add whole PO items to workflow ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am not sure how system will read every PO for the line items and then fetch those into email. Because email is just to inform a user to approve something in his SAP inbox where they can find the details of PO in my inbox.

Also, here the link to Email Notification for workflow.

E-mail Notification for PR/PO Approver - SAP Community

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: HANA On-Prem to HANA Cloud Datalake without HANA Cloud DB
entry.content: What message/error do you get when you try to create the remote table?

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
@richard_codron we do support creating a Rank on a Chart. It is available via the right-click context menu OR via the three dot menu. There are just a handful of unsupported features that are remaining in the Optimized Experience which can be found in our official documentation HERE. 

NOTE there are certain features which will not be supported in the Optimized Experience. You can find that within the section called Features That Won't Be Available in Optimized Story Experience. We've updated our documentation to make it more clear.

For issues around quality, please submit bugs to SAP so that we can investigate and resolve them as soon as possible.

entry.title: How to get the multiple include option for filter fields in fiori UI created via custom entity CDS?
entry.content:
I have created a Fiori UI5 via BAS using a custom CDS entity as a data source.

My UI screen looks like below with few selection items for filters and a list report to display.

Now when i click on the F4 help request on any of the input fields, im not able to see any option for selection other than "EQUALS" such as "BETWEEN" or "EXCLUDE", which by default comes when a normal CDS view is exposed as a service.

I have created a v4 service exposing this custom entity.

Even in my BAS annotation.xml the filter restrictions have all the required include options. 

@Andre_Fischer Need you expertise here to help me with a solution. Thank you in advance

entry.title: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts

 

Any idea how to read incoming xml namespace using groovy script ?

Requirement is to validate namespace and if it does not match the correct version, fail the iflow.

I was also thinking abt XSLT but how do I then fail the iflow it version does not match?

<xsl:if test="//namespace::*[.!='http://testns/2.6']">

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content:
I actually never tried to change the status (i.e. the next number).

However, be aware that numbers are buffered on the application server. You can see the size of the buffer in SNRO.

It is not completely clear to me what you want to achieve. How about lowering the upper limit of the number range  to 10000070900, and create a new number range starting wherever you want, an reassign the inspection origins to the new number range.

Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI

entry.title: Re: How to get the multiple include option for filter fie...
entry.content: show us your metadata, that determines a lot of thing.

entry.title: Re: Recursion in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Just to improve the performance by doing one recursion instead of two:

CLASS local_class1 DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS fibonacci
      IMPORTING !n            TYPE i
      RETURNING VALUE(result) TYPE i.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    METHODS fibonacci_2
      IMPORTING prev_prev     TYPE i
                prev          TYPE i
                occ           TYPE i
      RETURNING VALUE(result) TYPE i.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS local_class1 IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD fibonacci.
    result = fibonacci_2( prev_prev = 0
                          prev      = 1
                          occ       = n ).
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD fibonacci_2.
    IF occ <= 2.
      result = prev_prev + prev.
    ELSE.
      result = fibonacci_2( prev_prev = prev
                            prev      = prev_prev + prev
                            occ       = occ - 1 ).
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: BAPI for product allocation Check gATP
entry.content:
Hello Team,

are you able to call GATP function (product allocation and product availability) check from non SAP systems (sales force or from external portal)

 

Thanks,

Suneel

entry.title: Re: Revenue Accounting and Reporting (RAR) | Concept and Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Shailly.

As I remember to close RAR contract you have to complete all POBs first. POB status should be C or D (Manually Completed). You can complete POB by Finalization Date (e.g. if sending component is SD you can set Reason of Rejection on Sales Item level). Moreover, CA/CL (UR/DR) balance should be zero to set RAR Contract as Completed. 

Best regards,

Marcin

entry.title: Re: HANA On-Prem to HANA Cloud Datalake without HANA Clou...
entry.content:
You mentioned that you have created the REMOTE SERVER connection, but I don't see any mention of creating the virtual table definition. 

Have you executed a CREATE EXISTING TABLE statement and did it succeed? 

Assuming that you have successfully executed the CREATE EXISTING TABLE statement, can you also provide the SELECT statement that you are using to retrieve data from the virtual table?

entry.title: Re: how to send message to all portal active users?
entry.content: Hi Chitra, I think in SAP JAVA messaging is not possible.

entry.title: PO Modification only print the line changed in the pdf embeded in modification email
entry.content:
Hi
We are trying to reove message sending on delivery completed for POs.

We first went to SPRO : Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Fields relevant to printouts of changes and deselect PO column

We then had to come to SPRO and add
Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Output Control > Message type > define message type for purchase order > Maintain Message Types for PO
We have set Program to FM06AEND and FORM routine to CHANGE_FLAG.

 

It seems to wok but now when we change a line (material) in the PO, instead of receiving the whole new PO attached as PDF, the PDF only contains the line changed.

Do you know where this could come from ? Or do you know what is the abap program called to generate the PO PDF ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Update Position Object Data on Job Requisition Using Integration Center
entry.content: Based on the new feature RCM-125443  - Ability to Update Position Object Data on Job Requisition Using Integration Center. Where do we find the documentation on how to setup the integration center job to utilize this feature? Does anyone have an integration definition for this we could import?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David, 

I’m Magid, and I’m thrilled to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner. I work with a company named ECC, where we specialize in delivering comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses throughout the Middle East. Our mission is to help organizations effectively adopt and maximize the benefits of SAP solutions. As a new member of this community, I’m excited to learn from experienced SAP professionals and contribute as much as I can. Feel free to send me a private message—I’m looking forward to getting started and connecting with you all!

entry.title: Re: Are SAP ASE and IQ On Premise maintained?
entry.content: Hi Robert, any news regarding the future of SAP IQ for on-premises installations? Is it still possible to buy/resell IQ after 2025-12-31? Will there be an IQ 16.2 or IQ 17 or similar? Unfortunately, unlike ASE (16.1 to be released in 2025), I did not find a successor for IQ in the PAM yet. Thanks. BR, Leupi

entry.title: Re: Update Position Object Data on Job Requisition Using Integration Center
entry.content: you can refer to the documentation here - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/e0132b1a92ba4e05ac98bb2b70cf2226.html?q=RCM-125443.. This is configuration that would need to be implemented & once done and if there is a use case, this field can be updated via Integration Center.

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content:
Thanks Ryan. how do I read ns using XSLT. i tried <xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::*"/>

but it returns the last ns as xml has multiple ones.

Example

 <root xmlns:ns1="http://example.com/a" xmls:ns2: "http://example.com/b" xmls:ns3: "http://example.com/c"> 

Lets say I just want to validate ns1.

 <xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::*"/> returns the last namespace (ns3),

entry.title: Re: We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June. Post the DC change in August, we again che
entry.content: Ideally, if you have the SSL Certificate with validity date of 27 July 2025, this wouldn't required to be updated again till that date. Which Data Center are you and to which are you moving to?

entry.title: Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) : CREDIT CARD PROGRAM MANAGEMENT SAC Story
entry.content:
Overview

The Concur Expense Data Templates for the Concur Data Delivery Service (DDS) Expense content package offers a powerful solution for visualizing and analyzing data captured in SAP Concur. Seamlessly integrated with SAP Data Delivery Services and utilizing the SAP Analytics Cloud for data visualization, this solution provides administrators with comprehensive insights into organizational expenses, system administration, and user distributions. Its advanced analytics capabilities include robust auditing and control features essential for fraud detection and compliance assurance.

Built upon Analytical Models in SAP Datasphere and visualized in SAP Analytics Cloud, this content package encompasses a suite of detailed stories that deliver in-depth perspectives on expense management. These insights empower administrators to make informed decisions, optimize expense workflows, and enhance overall financial governance.

One standout feature is the Credit Card Program Management SAC Story. Designed to streamline and oversee credit card programs, it integrates and visualizes card usage data to provide a holistic view of cardholder activity and program efficiency. Additionally, it offers detailed insights into credit card transactions, highlighting spending patterns, transaction volumes, and potential anomalies, thereby significantly enhancing financial oversight and fraud detection.

Credit Card Program Management

This dashboard offers a comprehensive overview of your company's financial landscape by presenting key metrics related to credit card spend. It serves as a centralized hub for monitoring and analyzing credit card related financial performance, aiding in strategic decision-making and budget management.  

  • Adoption Rate: Presenting the proportion of credit card usage in total transactions (entries) 
  • Adoption Rate by Employee Location: Analysis of the geographic spread of credit card adoption among employees 
  • Top Spenders by Payment Type: Shows a breakdown of highest credit card spend across Payment Types 
  • Top Spenders by Payment Type: Provides key insights into highest credit card spenders and their payment preferences. 
  • Top Credit Card Spend by Vendor: Displays the vendors with the highest credit card expenditure.  

 

Credit Card Transaction Analysis

This dashboard offers an analytical view of credit card spend across your organization. It provides key metrics related to credit card expenses yet to be processed, allowing to monitor and manage unprocessed spend. By highlighting the distribution of transactions across age brackets or per approval status this dashboard aids tracking credit card spend across time or also allows a view via the regional distribution, thus allowing a complete overview for making decisions.  

  • Aging Card Transactions: This chart shows the distribution of Card Transactions across different age brackets.  
  • Spend by Country: Provides a breakdown of credit card expenditure across countries.  
  • Credit Card Transaction per Approval Status: Displays an analysis of transactions by approval status.  
  • Top Employees with Unprocessed CC Transactions: Presents key employees with outstanding credit card transactions.  
  • Credit Card Transaction Details: Displays a detailed list of employee credit card spend.  

Resources:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/data-templates-for-dds-expense-administration-sac-story/ba-p/13805542

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-blogs-by-sap/data-templates-for-concur-data-delivery-expense/ba-p/13799924

  • https://www.concur.com/data-delivery-service

  • https://api.sap.com/package/SAPConcurExpenseDDSIntegrationwithSAPDatasphere/overview

entry.title: Maintenance Technicians as Workcenters
entry.content:
I have a situation where I don't have access to HR module, for maintenance technicians. I need to make departments and personnel responsible for maintenance plans and schedules and to be notified.

The work around I was given was to create workcenters as maintenance technicians... assign them as the "Maint Workcenter" I don't feel I can log multiple technicians on one job, and I can't have any metrics or time logging.

Is there a way I can have KPIs and any other metrics without using HR module, what will I not be able to do with out personnel resources for my PMs and WOs scheduling.

entry.title: Re: API Integration from EC to ADP WFN
entry.content: While having worked with a lot of integrations with ADP. I would recommend below -

entry.title: Re: API Integration from EC to ADP WFN
entry.content:
1. Generally the integrations that I have done in the past is getting the Data Pulled from CPI via API's then placing the files for ADP to be processed.

2. This approach is similar to Replication process as how it's done between EC and ECC. This approach uses the PA_SE_IN Add-on provided by SAP and is direct webservice based communication that happens between ADP and EC.

3. Reach out to ADP Representative via your client and see what other options ADP has for connectivity.

entry.title: Re: MB90 - Print Preview
entry.content:
Hi, can you help me with this...

While I'm selecting multiple documents i.e. multiple mblnr & print preview it is only showing first document. I'm using Wa03 output type & Entry_ Wa03 routine. Actually while selecting mblnr from nast- objkey, the nast structure is only picking first document & there is no loop or other way. Can you please help what is the solution!!

entry.title: Re: Mass updtate Work Agreements
entry.content: It really depends on how you have created the employees first. If it is through "Manage workforce" application, then you may need to check the feasibility of "Import" icon , see whether this can be updated. You can also check the API (if it is created through SOAP API) in our API repository.

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content: I can use <xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::ns1"/>

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content:
You would alter your variable to the following - 

<xsl:variable name="nspace" select="//namespace::ns1"/>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: How should the cost center key be defined in Employee Central?
entry.content: The reason why the Cost Center ID has the Controlling area would be handle the scenarios when you have Core Hybrid Architecture. It's where you have EC and ECC system integrated.

entry.title: Re: User id in IT0105 ST0001 was changed. What happens to...
entry.content: User changes are not allowed during workflow execution as it creates inconsistency. Any change in the business document can restart the workflow and it could be a reason there was a new user or you may also need to check the substitute rules

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for Business Partner replication using SOAP API'
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Master Data

entry.title: Re: Adding / changing printer for Manage Physical Inventory Documents app
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: Precondition is not working in Maintain validation and Substitution rules app when data comes AP
entry.content: Hi SUBRATB , can you please tell us what API you are using ?

entry.title: Re: S4HC: How to output purchase order PDF and CSV (or XML) simultaneously?
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

Did you get any solution?

I'm trying to use the XCO_CP* class but I haven't found a solution either.

I need to look for the definition of fields and elements of a structure/table in the trial cloud environment (BTP),

entry.title: Re: SAP IRPA Cloud Factory Trial: Execution is not permitted on tenant
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: SAP IRPA Cloud Factory Trial: Execution is not permitted on tenant
entry.content: Hello, i have pay-as-you-go subscription plan for sap build process automation, with attended-automation plan subscribed, assignd quota. but i get the same error, when i try to run automation launcher , SAP_IPA_05066: Execution is not permitted on tenant "xxxxxxx" . Any help is appreciated @Srinivas @priyanka_kes9

entry.title: How do you synchronize suppliers in SAP Ariba with Business Partners post refresh?
entry.content:
Ariba Experts,

When a client conducts a refresh of their QAS environment with their PRD environment and copies all their PRD Business Partners, how do you synchronize them with the SAP Ariba Test environment, which will already have suppliers from previous integrations with the QAS, implementation, and previous refreshes? Since there are already suppliers in the SAP Ariba Test environment, many of them will have the same ERP Vendor ID as the copied Business Partners from PRD. Additionally, when a new supplier is created in the SAP Ariba Test environment and integrated with with QAS, there is a possibillity that the new ERP Vendor ID assigned will already exist in the SAP Ariba Test environment and therefore not completely integrate.

For example, a client just completed their second QAS refresh in two years and their PRD environment has ~4400 Business Partners that were copied to the QAS environment while the SAP Ariba Test environment has ~14,000 suppliers.

I understand that SAP Ariba does not delete suppliers, but deactivates them.

I am trying to understand the best approach for synchronizing the refreshed QAS Business Partners with the SAP Ariba Test environment. There must be a method of appropriately deactivating the previous SAP Ariba Test suppliers to support a supplier master data import of Business Partners to maintain ERP Vendor ID and other IDs so that the SAP Ariba Test supplier database is synchronized with the QAS Business Partner data base.

Any information on how best to do this would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Default account assignment for cost element in FS00
entry.content:
Hi friends,

There was an issue with the depreciation GL 7xxxxx while running the depreciation. it says cost element 7xxxxx should have the CO object.

when i go to FS00 and open this GL 7xxxxx and click on edit cost element

in the Default acc assignment tab I have assigned the cost center.

 

But we have the same GL 7xxxx in other company codes as well and the cost center is updating the GL in all the company codes.

i want only one company code GL should update the cost center. 

please suggest me the right process to do the same.

 

Thanks. #fs00 #costcenter 

@OwenLiu @HenrikeGrötecke @Fabio_Sohn @RAHEEL_BABAR @Edrilan_Berisha

entry.title: Re: Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content: Hello, what happens is that with the change of range for inspection class 01, you included the other inspection classes.

entry.title: Re: Data Analyzer URL Parameter
entry.content: Hello colleagues, I have managed to add 2 values "EMEA" and "EMEA North" for one dimension like this (with help of html encoding for double quotations and square brackets), if it helps anyone. So it's: NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer("&/dz/?dataSourceName=".concat(Table_1.getDataSource().getInfo().modelId).concat("&systemType=MODEL&f01Dim=Geo_Level_1_Region_Description&f01Val=%5B%22EMEA%22,%22EMEA%20North%22%5D&f0p=in"));

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hello  - Results as follows :

  1. Preview the App showing all the columns, search and filter options in the CDS view entity.

    1.  

  2. Search records based on a specific value from 'Description' field and select an available value from the 'Status' field.

    1.  

    2.  

    3.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: nice day

entry.title: Re: I want to export or save an invoice as an xml file.
entry.content:
Hi Stefan 

You don't need a license for EDOC_COCKPIT you can use the trial version for free.

With the free version, you can create an invoice and display XML but can not send it.

If you cannot view the invoice in the cockpit, there is a high probability that there is a deficiency somewhere in the configuration steps that you have overlooked.

BR

entry.title: Re: Subobject type Z100 is not valid for object type BT126_APPT
entry.content:
Thank you, this was really helpful for me also. To be precise what i did:

looking for: 

component usage: CUBT131QI_SLSQ

Object type: BT115Q_SLSQ

Subobject (hardcoded): ZCN1_ZCN1

My entry in customizing of object types mentioned: 

Object type: BT115Q_SLSQ

Callback class (made custom): ZCL_NEK_OBJTYPE_CALLBACK

Component name (interaction layer): BT

BOL Object: BTOrder

BOR object type: BUS2000115

Enahced object: SALES_QUOTATION

Hope this will fasten definition for others.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Good afternoon, 

My name is Kobe, I am a recent MHA graduate from UNC Chapel Hill. Before attending grad school, I served in the US Air Force for 6 years where I specialized in supply chain management. I am currently looking forward to learning more about SAP Supply Chain so that I can list my certifications on my resume and bolster my chances of bettering my career.

entry.title: Re: Statutory reporting transformation with SAP S/4HANA: charting a successful adoption journey
entry.content: Good Information.

entry.title: Stock upload with existing handling Units
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to upload stock where I have HU with external number range.

For some reason , when I upload a stock I get a warning message "HU XXX is not set for external. New number is taken from internal range".

Any idea, which settings I have to change?

entry.title: Bloquear campo en documentos de marketing ordenes de venta
entry.content:
Buenas Tardes

Soy nuevo en SAP y necesitaría de su apoyo, ya que tengo la necesidad de que en las líneas de marketing del proceso de ordenes de venta se necesita bloquear un campo UDF personalizado. Se necesita que sea por transaction. Este campo es tipo fecha.

entry.title: Re: SAC publication on DWC
entry.content: Hello, have you found an alternative to be able to schedule the calendar using DWC Live Connection?

entry.title: Re: Using Github Actions to Deploy a CAP App (MTA)
entry.content:
@Christopher_Ketzler 

Great blog! While I have used the predefined action before, I hadn't thought of creating my own script instead. Thank you for sharing this.

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content:
hi @Sandeep_9966 

Sorry for getting back to you only now on your question. Have you tried the below ? 

  • Percentages in the Proration field can be higher than 100% only if the following tag in the XML of the template (currently not supported through Admin UI) is set to True : canExceedReviewPeriod=”true”

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: C4C Service Process- Multiple Registered Product
entry.content: Hi Ankush, Thank you for your response. I also tried a similar approach: I went to Ticket -> Overview facet -> Product section, clicked the value help for the Serial Id field, and in the 'Select Registered Product' window, I used the Advanced Filter. I removed all default values (such as Customer ID) and created a custom query as needed. However, the next time I tried to add a Registered Product using the Advanced Filter, the Account ID appeared by default, and it seems that this Account ID cannot be modified. It appears that removing the Account ID from the Advanced Filter will always require manual intervention

entry.content: Patel, como estas, existe alguna TRX que reemplace a la SM01?

entry.title: Risk category for 10% of open items or open item more than 30 days ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have configured Risk category for  Max open item % = 10 and NoDays openI as 30. But it blocks only for number of days open not for Max open item%

What am I missing?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Are SAP ASE and IQ On Premise maintained?
entry.content: SAP IQ is available as part of the Adaptive Server Platform which also includes SAP ASE and SAP Replication Server. We are working through the planning process for the next major release of SAP IQ.
